execution_result.paddle_error: TypeError: conv3d_transpose() got an unexpected keyword argument 'filters'

llm_operation.reason: PaddlePaddle conv3d_transpose does not accept 'filters' argument; it uses 'weight' instead. Also, Paddle expects weight shape [M, C/g, kD, kH, kW] (output_channels, input_channels/group, depth, height, width), unlike TF's [depth, height, width, output_channels, input_channels]. Input layout must be NCDHW for Paddle, so x shape must be [2, 3, 5, 6, 4] (N, C, D, H, W) to match TF's NDHWC [2, 5, 6, 4, 3]. Output_shape is not supported in Paddle; use output_size=None and rely on auto-calculation or compute manually.
